title: CloudPay Status - Major Payment Processing Incident
snippet: Investigating — We are experiencing a major incident affecting payment processing in the Asia-Pacific region. Started at 14:30 UTC. Impact: Payment API, Refund API, Webhooks.

title: CloudPay Suffers Major Outage, Asia-Pacific Merchants Impacted
snippet: Payment gateway CloudPay is experiencing a significant service disruption since early afternoon UTC. Multiple merchants report payment processing failures across the Asia-Pacific region...

title: CloudPay is down – payment processing failures across Asia-Pacific
snippet: Multiple reports of CloudPay API returning 503 errors. Some users reporting partial recovery at 18:00 UTC but webhooks still not firing. Discussion of root cause and workarounds...

title: CloudPay Incident Update: Database Migration Issue Identified
snippet: Update: We have identified the root cause as a failed database migration in our v3.2.1 update. Our engineering team is working on a rollback. Estimated recovery: 22:30 UTC.

title: AsiaPay Integration Quick Start Guide — For CloudPay Merchants
snippet: AsiaPay provides a drop-in replacement API compatible with CloudPay. Emergency migration takes 30 minutes. Compatible API format, same webhook structure.

title: PCI DSS v4.0 Incident Response Requirements
snippet: Under PCI DSS v4.0, merchants must notify their acquiring bank within 72 hours of a payment service disruption. Documentation requirements and compliance timeline...

title: 支付网关CloudPay大规模宕机，亚太区商户受影响

title: Workaround for CloudPay Outage: Queue and Retry Pattern
snippet: During the ongoing outage, here's a tested workaround: implement a local payment queue. Also: route through US-West endpoint or failover to AsiaPay...

title: The True Cost of Payment Gateway Outages: A 2026 Analysis
snippet: Mid-size merchants lose an average of $35,000-$50,000 per hour during payment gateway outages. Beyond direct revenue loss, customer churn increases by 15-20%...

title: CloudPay September 2025 Outage: Post-Mortem Published
